title: Mantecare-mellowed Italian Egg Yolk Pizza
description: A charred, crisp, and indulgent Italian dish featuring cumin seeds and mantecare-emulsified egg yolks, perfect for a romantic dinner. Whole30-friendly and cooked to perfection on an iron teppan.
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan to 550°F (290°C) for at least 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, proof the homemade pizza dough in a warm place for 1-2 hours.
In a small saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over low heat and whisk in the mantecare emulsifier until smooth.
Add the egg yolks to the butter mixture and whisk until combined.
Season the egg yolk mixture with salt and set aside.
On the preheated iron teppan, place the pizza dough and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly charred.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet and top with the egg yolk mixture, mozzarella cheese, and chopped fresh basil leaves.
Return the baking sheet to the iron teppan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from heat and let cool for 1-2 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with additional chopped basil leaves and serve immediately.
